features.name: Google Sheets API Proxy
features.description: Proxies IPL payment schedule data from Google Sheets, keeping sensitive sheets details (GOOGLE_API_KEY, SHEET_ID) hidden from the browser.

features.name: Object Storage Caching (Tigris)
features.description: S3-compatible Tigris storage cache combined with a 30-second local memory cache to optimize sheet loads, bypass API quotas, and offer offline failover protection.

features.name: Dynamic Privacy Safeguard (Name Stripping)
features.description: Server-side data sanitization. If the requesting user is a regular resident (non-committee), the server dynamically strips the 'Nama' column from the data before sending it to the client.

features.name: Backend SSO Authentication Client
features.description: Express middleware (requireAuth) that parses and validates the wildcard cookie ('veryresto-auth') via Supabase. Redirects unauthenticated users to the portal while preserving query states.

features.name: Namespaced Permissions Enforcer
features.description: Verifies that approved residents possess the namespaced permission 'rekap_viewer.read_data' before serving API data or the main board.

features.name: Double-Tiered Failure Routing
features.description: Differentiates between 401 Unauthorized (unauthenticated users redirected to SSO) and 403 Forbidden (known, unapproved, or rejected users redirected to the local denial page).

features.name: In-Process Stored Cache with TTL
features.description: Under-the-hood Map-based memory caches with 45-second TTL that track JWT verifications, approval states, committee roles, and namespaced permissions to limit database query load.

features.name: Ecosystem Analytics Forwarder
features.description: Relays user interaction tracking events from the client via /api/analytics directly to the shared analytics_events table in Supabase.

features.name: Mobile-First Sticky Grid Layout
features.description: Vanilla JS-rendered grid featuring frozen headers, sticky block/number columns, status indicators, and responsive filters.

pages.name: IPL Payment Dashboard
pages.description: The main payment visualization board. Gated by Express auth middleware. Sets Cache-Control: no-store to prevent browser caching of private data.

pages.name: Access Denied Fallback Screen
pages.description: Dynamic warning screen displaying specific notices for pending, rejected, suspended, or unauthorized users. Provides sign-out and return links.

apis.name: GET /api/rekap
apis.description: Serves the processed Google Sheets payment rows from cache, dynamically filtering out resident names for non-committee accounts.

apis.name: GET /api/me
apis.description: Retrieves authenticated user session data, profile details, and assigned roles.

apis.name: POST /api/analytics
apis.description: Relays track logs from the client to the shared analytics_events table.

apis.name: POST /api/logout
apis.description: Triggers global Supabase logout and clears the local subdomain session cookie.

apis.name: GET /health
apis.description: Public health check endpoint returning deployment timestamp, status, and Fly region.

apis.name: GET /auth-denied
apis.description: Serves the public static access-denied HTML page.

database_tables.name: public.profiles
database_tables.description: Ecosystem-wide profile directory. Queried to read approval status and classification metadata.

database_tables.name: public.user_roles
database_tables.description: Ecosystem-wide platform roles. Read to verify platform manager/committee access.

database_tables.name: public.user_app_roles
database_tables.description: Ecosystem App-RBAC mappings. Queried by has_namespaced_permission RPC.

background_jobs.name: Google Sheets Cache Refresh
background_jobs.description: Runs on the Express server background thread to fetch fresh payment records from the Google Sheets API and update the Tigris object storage S3 cache.

background_jobs.name: In-Memory Auth Cache Cleaner
background_jobs.description: Sweeps the local Express server memory caches to purge expired TTL records, preventing memory leak accumulation.
